title: Karivellur Mahadeva Temple
tagline: Karivellur Mahadeva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Karivellur Mahadeva Temple or 'Karivellur Shiva Temple' is a Shiva temple situated at Karivellur near Payyanur neighbourhood in Kannur in the state of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Karivellur Mahadeva Temple or 'Karivellur Shiva Temple' is a Shiva temple situated at Karivellur near Payyanur neighbourhood in Kannur in the state of Kerala, India. This temple was owned by Chitrakkal Kovilakam. It is one of the 108 Shiva Temples. The temple is located with the coordinates of 12.172963°N 75.190189°E / 12.172963; 75.190189 at Karivellur near Payyanur in Kannur district, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Arangadi
topPlaces.description: Arangadi is a village in the kanhangad municipality of the Kasaragod district in the Indian state of Kerala. Arangadi is also known as Sithasook.

topPlaces.name: Karivellur
topPlaces.description: Karivellur is a census town and a Gram Panchayat in the Kannur district of Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Peralam (Kannur)
topPlaces.description: Peralam is a village in Payyanur Taluk of Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Maniyat
topPlaces.description: Maniyat is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Pilicode
topPlaces.description: Pilicode, or Pulicode, is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India. On 12 April 2018, Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan declared Pilicode as the first filament bulb-free panchayat in India as part of the Oorjayanam (ഊര്‍ജയാനം) project.

topPlaces.name: Kodakkad
topPlaces.description: Kodakkad is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thrikaripur
topPlaces.description: Thrikaripur is a small town located in south part of Kasaragod District in the state of Kerala, India. Its southernmost end Olavara touches Payyannur, Kannur District.

topPlaces.name: GHS Trikarpur
topPlaces.description: GHS Trikarpur, also known as GVHSS Trikarpur and GHS Trikaripur, is a government vocational higher secondary school in Thrikaripur, Kerala. The school has upper primary divisions, secondary divisions and higher secondary divisions.

items.note: Arangadi is a village in the kanhangad municipality of the Kasaragod district in the Indian state of Kerala. Arangadi is also known as Sithasook.
Karivellur is a census town and a Gram Panchayat in the Kannur district of Kerala state, India.
Peralam is a village in Payyanur Taluk of Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala.
Maniyat is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.

Pilicode, or Pulicode, is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India. On 12 April 2018, Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan declared Pilicode as the first filament bulb-free panchayat in India as part of the Oorjayanam (ഊര്‍ജയാനം) project.
Kodakkad is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.
Thrikaripur is a small town located in south part of Kasaragod District in the state of Kerala, India. Its southernmost end Olavara touches Payyannur, Kannur District.

GHS Trikarpur, also known as GVHSS Trikarpur and GHS Trikaripur, is a government vocational higher secondary school in Thrikaripur, Kerala. The school has upper primary divisions, secondary divisions and higher secondary divisions.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Karivellur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Karivellur Mahadeva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Karivellur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (94 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (86 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Karivellur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Karivellur Mahadeva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Karivellur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Karivellur Mahadeva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Karivellur Mahadeva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Arangadi, Karivellur, Peralam (Kannur), Maniyat, Pilicode.
